name: KRL Rangkasbitung Line Schedule Candidate (Local Only)
source_name: KAI Commuter official website schedule API
license: schedule waived for local use; OSM geometry ODbL
limitations: Schedule reuse terms waived by the project owner for local use only.
Station coordinates are from OpenStreetMap and require ODbL attribution before redistribution.
Source is website API schedule JSON, not a GTFS feed.
Only full Rangkasbitung to Tanah Abang and Tanah Abang to Rangkasbitung terminal services are included.
Intermediate stop times are scaled from a representative official train schedule.
Calendar validity dates are not provided by the source.
